scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p wasm-audio --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs release && node scripts/check-wasm-exports.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:dev: cargo build -p wasm-audio --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs debug && node scripts/check-wasm-exports.mjs
